channel.title: Mohammad Sadil Khan on Home
channel.description: Recent content in Mohammad Sadil Khan on Home

item.title: Iceland Trip
item.description: August 2025 · Campervan Journey Iceland Seven days. One campervan. An entire island of fire and ice. 7Days ~2 400km driven ∞Waterfalls In August 2025, we took a week-long campervan trip around Iceland — from Golden Circle hot springs to South Coast waterfalls, glacier lagoons, Eastfjords fishing villages, and the wildlife of the north and Snæfellsnes. It was seven days of drone flights, hot river soaks, black sand beaches, endless waterfalls, and fresh fish dinners — each day with its own theme and adventure.

item.title: AutoAnnotator - MacOS Utility App
item.description: Automatic Image Annotator for Computer Vision

Download PDF Work Experience Research Intern Huawei Noah's Ark Lab London, UK 3D Reconstruction and Parametric Surface Modeling. May 2025 – Present Research Assistant DFKI, RPTU Kaiserslautern, Germany Vision-Language Architectures for 3D Scene and Shape Reconstruction. Jun 2024 – Apr 2025 Student Researcher SnT, University of Luxembourg Kirchberg, Luxembourg 3D Shape Modelling with Deep Geometric-Language Models. Jan 2023 – Feb 2024 Research Intern Creatis, INSA Lyon Lyon, France 3D Medical Image Segmentation using Point Clouds.
